securityLevel.description: The hardware backing a signing key. Always reported as the ACHIEVED level, read back from the created key, never assumed from the request.

tierEvidence.description: How the achieved SecurityLevel was determined. A hardware level with evidence != 'attested' is an on-device self-report, not proof.

partialOrder.description: meetsFloor derives from a partial order over tier CLASSES, not a global ordinal. tpm is NOT weaker than tee.
